ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Unique Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., sports, sedan) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the vehicle (e.g., domestic, imported) */,
  "stolen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle has been stolen */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., available, sold, under repair) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was added to the inventory */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership where the vehicle is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vehicle's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the dealership */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the dealership */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Dealership's opening hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the dealership's website */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealerships_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager's tenure ended (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle whose record was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the update */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., theft, unauthorized access) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
